content.text: The spec uses a hard waitForTimeout and a getByText locator; holding with a punch-list bound to the reviewed head SHA.

input.command: t3 review record my-org/my-repo 4120 --verdict hold --head-sha abc1234 --findings-json '[{"severity":"high","summary":"replace waitForTimeout(3000) with a web-first assertion","file":"e2e/specs/offer.spec.ts","line":42},{"severity":"high","summary":"replace getByText locator with a Page Object selector","file":"e2e/specs/offer.spec.ts","line":58}]'
input.description: Record a HOLD verdict with the punch-list
